<!--
PR guide (follow CLAUDE.md dev rules):
- /kind, /area labels (uncomment below)
- DCO sign-off required (git commit -s)
- Isolated scope: one PR = one problem
- Rule/logic changes need regression tests (TP+TN, bypass)
- Prefix the title with wip: if incomplete
-->

**Type** (uncomment):
> /kind bug
> /kind feature
> /kind cleanup
> /kind docs
> /kind failing-test

**Area** (uncomment):
> /area toolgate
> /area egress
> /area ebpf
> /area rules
> /area ci
> /area docs

**What this PR does / why**:

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**: Refs #

**Tests** (security tool — required):
- [ ] regression test added (fail before fix / pass after)
- [ ] TP(block) + TN(pass) pair
- [ ] (if applicable) bypass test
